vpn_compromise.title: Suspicious VPN Login
vpn_compromise.description: Multiple failed VPN logins were followed by a successful login from an unknown source IP. The account accessed remote services outside its normal pattern.

ransomware.title: Ransomware Activity on Endpoint
ransomware.description: EDR reported malware execution, rapid file encryption behavior, and suspicious process activity on a user workstation.

phishing_campaign.title: Credential Phishing Campaign
phishing_campaign.description: Multiple users reported phishing emails directing recipients to a credential harvesting page. Authentication alerts followed for several targeted accounts.

incidents.title: Suspicious VPN Login
incidents.summary: Failed VPN logins were followed by successful access from an unknown source IP.

incidents.title: Endpoint Malware Alert
incidents.summary: EDR detected malware execution and rapid file encryption behavior on a workstation.

incidents.title: Credential Phishing Campaign
incidents.summary: Users received credential harvesting emails before authentication alerts appeared for targeted accounts.
